title: Wool Bedwars Overlay
description: i made this for myself and for people who play bedwars or not
body:
**This Resource Pack Is Made To Change WOOL AND CARPET Textures To a Simple Wool Overlay Me Personlly Use This on Bedwars And Even All The Time And I Also Recommend Using This In Bedwars Even So it Looks Beautiful And Amazing**

**What Does It Do?**

it makes the wool and carpet texture look simple and great

**Why Would I Use It?**

If your a bedwars player you will like it and use it but if your a non bedwars player you should use it for how amazing it looks and if you are training for bedwars and bridging

NOTE BEFORE USING: do not use the incorrect version of the resource pack or it probably wont work

DO YOU HAVE MY CONSENT TO USE THIS IN A VIDEO?

yes indeed you can even hate speech are allowed

CAN I MAKE A CONTINUE VERSION OF THIS?

only if join the discord server and ask for permission and get accpeted
